series_metadata.series_title: Unitization Hearing Notice and Order Notice
series_metadata.series_description: Unitization Hearing Notices and Exhibits, Hearing Notice Tracking Spreadsheets, and proof of mailings, including certified mail signature pages, Simple Certified labels, and certified mail signature pages. This record series includes all hearing notice returned mail and order notice returned mail.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 2 years after an Order is issued on the application or request or 2 years after an application is withdrawn. ; Paper: 2 years after an Order is issued on the application or request or 2 years after an application is withdrawn. If records are scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may recycled be at that time., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Recycle
